program.name: acr
program.description: A tool to analyze commits and create new ones with AI assistance

analyze.name: analyze
analyze.description: Analyze commits individually or in groups from the local Git repository

create.name: create
create.description: Create a new commit with AI assistance

set_config.name: set_config
set_config.description: Updates configurations in the format KEY=VALUE (e.g., OPENAI_API_KEY=<value>)
set_config.usage_example: Updates configurations in the format KEY=VALUE (e.g., OPENAI_API_KEY=<value>)

messages.prompt: What do you want to do?

commands.analyze: Analyze commits individually or in groups from the local Git repository
commands.create: Create a new commit with AI assistance
commands.set_config: Updates configurations in the format KEY=VALUE (e.g., OPENAI_API_KEY=<value>)

errors.missing_key_value: ❌ Missing keyValue argument for set_config command.

messagesAnalyzeCommits.noAdditionalCommits: ⚠️ No additional commits to load. All available commits are displayed.
messagesAnalyzeCommits.selectCommitsPrompt: Select commits to analyze (Press Enter to finalize):
messagesAnalyzeCommits.noCommitsSelected: ⚠️ You did not select any commits for analysis.
messagesAnalyzeCommits.noModifiedFiles: ⚠️ No modified files found in the commit.
messagesAnalyzeCommits.noValidDifferences: ⚠️ No valid differences found for analysis.

checkbox.name: selectedShas
checkbox.message: Select commits to analyze (Press Enter to finalize):

statusesAnalyzeCommits.warningNoCommits: ⚠️ No additional commits to load. All available commits are displayed.
statusesAnalyzeCommits.warningNoFiles: ⚠️ No modified files found in the commit.
statusesAnalyzeCommits.warningNoDifferences: ⚠️ No valid differences found for analysis.

configConfig.configFileNotFound: Configuration file not found at: {{configFilePath}}. Using default settings.

validateConfiguration.errorMissingApiKey:
OpenAI API key not configured.

Use 'acr set_config OPENAI_API_KEY=your-key' to configure it.

updateConfigFromString.errorInvalidKey:
Invalid configuration key "%s".

Available keys:
%s

Use one of the listed keys.

❌ Invalid AI model provided.

Available models:

Use one of the listed models.
updateConfigFromString.errorInvalidLanguage:
❌ Invalid language code "%s" provided.

Supported languages:
%s

Use one of the listed language codes.

branch.current: You are currently on the branch: {{branch}}
branch.continuePrompt: Do you want to continue working on this branch?
branch.selectPrompt: Select the branch to switch to:

conflict.detected: ❌ Conflicts detected in the following files:
conflict.confirmResolution: Have you resolved the conflict for: {{file}}?
conflict.stageChangesPrompt: Would you like to stage the resolved files?
conflict.filesNotStagedWarning: ⚠️ Files not staged. Resolve remaining conflicts before proceeding.
conflict.resolutionOptionPrompt: How would you like to resolve the conflicts?

commit.messageOptionPrompt: How would you like to proceed with the commit message?
commit.emptyMessageError: ❌ The commit message cannot be empty.
commit.abortPrompt: Do you want to abort the commit and undo all changes?
commit.commitAborted: ⚠️ Commit aborted. The changes have been returned to unstaged.

push.pushPrompt: Do you want to push to the remote repository?

general.errorDuringCommitProcess: ❌ Error during the commit creation process:

undoLastCommitSoft.undoing: 🔄 Undoing the last commit without altering the changes...
undoLastCommitSoft.undone: ✔ Last commit undone. The changes remain staged.

getStagedFilesDiffs.errorRetrievingDiffs: ❌ Error retrieving diffs for staged files:

pullChanges.pulled: ✔ Successfully pulled the latest changes from the remote repository.

pushChanges.pushed: ✔ Changes successfully pushed to the remote repository!

getConflictDiff.errorRetrievingConflictDiff: ❌ Error retrieving conflict diff for file '{{file}}':

showHelp.descriptionText: A tool to analyze and create commits and code with AI assistance directly from the local Git repository.

variables.OPENAI_API_MODEL: OPENAI_API_MODEL: The AI model used for analysis (e.g., gpt-4, gpt-4-turbo).
variables.OPENAI_RESPONSE_LANGUAGE: OPENAI_RESPONSE_LANGUAGE: The language for AI responses (e.g., pt-BR, en-US).

commandList.analyze: acr analyze                  Lists and analyzes the latest commits.
commandList.create: acr create                   Creates a new commit with AI assistance.
commandList.setConfig: acr set_config <key=value> Updates configurations (e.g., OPENAI_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_MODEL, OPENAI_RESPONSE_LANGUAGE).
commandList.help: acr help                     Displays this detailed help.

exampleList.configureApiKey:
- Configure the OpenAI API key:
  acr set_config OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-your-key
exampleList.configureModel:
- Configure the AI model:
  acr set_config OPENAI_API_MODEL=gpt-4
exampleList.configureLanguage:
- Configure the response language:
  acr set_config OPENAI_RESPONSE_LANGUAGE=en-US
exampleList.analyzeLatest:
- Analyze the latest commits:
  acr analyze
exampleList.createCommit:
- Create a commit with AI assistance:
  acr create

tipsList.setConfig: - Use acr set_config to set your preferences before using the tool.
tipsList.secureApiKey: - Ensure your API key (OPENAI_API_KEY) is kept secure.
tipsList.analyzeRecent: - Analyze only the most recent commits to improve accuracy and save API resources.
tipsList.documentation: - Refer to the documentation or open an issue on GitHub if you encounter problems.
